# REVIFF

> REVIFF is a free, 100% local PDF and drawing comparison desktop app for architects and AEC teams, published by AEC DX Labs. It compares revised drawing sets entirely on the user's Windows PC — no cloud upload, no signup, no subscription, no watermark.

## What it is
- **Product:** REVIFF
- **Publisher:** AEC DX Labs
- **Platform:** Windows 10 (version 1809 or newer, 64-bit) and Windows 11
- **Price:** Free. No signup, no subscription, no premium feature locked, no watermark.
- **Distribution:** Microsoft Store
- **Privacy:** Comparison runs locally. Drawings never leave the workstation; there is no cloud dependency in the review path.
- **Hardware:** CPU optimized. No dedicated graphics hardware required.

## Supported file types
PDF plus PNG, JPG, JPEG, BMP, GIF, TIF, and TIFF images.

## Key features
- Split mode: view two drawing revisions side by side.
- Diff mode: highlight what changed between revisions.
- Cloud Marks: automatic detection of revision cloud marks.
- Auto-align and partial align: align pages and regions for accurate comparison.

## Common questions
- **Is REVIFF free?** Yes. No signup, no subscription, no premium feature locked, and no watermark.
- **Does REVIFF upload drawings?** No. The comparison workflow runs locally on your Windows PC.
- **What file types can it compare?** PDF and common image formats (PNG, JPG, JPEG, BMP, GIF, TIF, TIFF).
- **Why Microsoft Store only?** It keeps install, updates, and product identity clearer for Windows users.

## Links
- Home (English): https://reviff.com/
- Home (Japanese): https://reviff.com/ja
- Download: https://reviff.com/download
- Compare hub: https://reviff.com/compare
- REVIFF vs Bluebeam Revu: https://reviff.com/compare/bluebeam-revu
- Changelog: https://reviff.com/changelog
- Privacy: https://reviff.com/privacy
- Support: https://reviff.com/support

## Important clarification
- REVIFF is not a complete replacement for the broader Bluebeam Revu platform.
- The comparison page primarily evaluates Bluebeam Revu's desktop Compare Documents workflow, not every capability of the wider Bluebeam platform.
- AEC DX Labs and Bluebeam are not affiliated.

## Contact
- Email: hello@aecdxlabs.com
